nasb.text: The surviving remnant of the house of Judah will again take root downward and bear fruit upward.

esv.text: And the surviving remnant of the house of Judah shall again take root downward and bear fruit upward.

cnv.text: 猶大家所逃脫的餘民，必再向下扎根，往上結果。

ccb.text: 犹大的幸存者要再次向下扎根，向上结果。

csbs.text: 犹大家残留的幸存者将再次往下扎根，向上结果；
